segments.text: As Jesus was leaving the temple, one of his disciples said to him,
Look, Teacher! What massive stones! What magnificent buildings!
segments.speaker: Disciple

segments.text: replied Jesus.
Not one stone here will be left on another; every one will be thrown down.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: As Jesus was sitting on the Mount of Olives opposite the temple, Peter, James, John and Andrew asked him privately,
Tell us, when will these things happen? And what will be the sign that they are all about to be fulfilled?
segments.speaker: Peter, James, John and Andrew

segments.text: Jesus said to them:
Watch out that no one deceives you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Many will come in my name, claiming, 'I am he,' and will deceive many.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: When you hear of wars and rumors of wars, do not be alarmed. Such things must happen, but the end is still to come.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Nation will rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom. There will be earthquakes in various places, and famines. These are the beginning of birth pains.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: You must be on your guard. You will be handed over to the local councils and flogged in the synagogues. On account of me you will stand before governors and kings as witnesses to them.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And the gospel must first be preached to all nations.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Whenever you are arrested and brought to trial, do not worry beforehand about what to say. Just say whatever is given you at the time, for it is not you speaking, but the Holy Spirit.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Brother will betray brother to death, and a father his child. Children will rebel against their parents and have them put to death.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Everyone will hate you because of me, but the one who stands firm to the end will be saved.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: When you see 'the abomination that causes desolation' standing where it does not belong—let the reader understand—then let those who are in Judea flee to the mountains.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Let no one on the housetop go down or enter the house to take anything out.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Let no one in the field go back to get their cloak.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: How dreadful it will be in those days for pregnant women and nursing mothers!
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Pray that this will not take place in winter,
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: because those will be days of distress unequaled from the beginning, when God created the world, until now—and never to be equaled again.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: If the Lord had not cut short those days, no one would survive. But for the sake of the elect, whom he has chosen, he has shortened them.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: At that time if anyone says to you, 'Look, here is the Messiah!' or, 'Look, there he is!' do not believe it.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: For false messiahs and false prophets will appear and perform signs and wonders to deceive, if possible, even the elect.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: So be on your guard; I have told you everything ahead of time.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But in those days, following that distress, 'the sun will be darkened, and the moon will not give its light;
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: the stars will fall from the sky, and the heavenly bodies will be shaken.'
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: At that time people will see the Son of Man coming in clouds with great power and glory.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And he will send his angels and gather his elect from the four winds, from the ends of the earth to the ends of the heavens.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Now learn this lesson from the fig tree: As soon as its twigs get tender and its leaves come out, you know that summer is near.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Even so, when you see these things happening, you know that it is near, right at the door.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Truly I tell you, this generation will certainly not pass away until all these things have happened.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Heaven and earth will pass away, but my words will never pass away.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But about that day or hour no one knows, not even the angels in heaven, nor the Son, but only the Father.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Be on guard! Be alert! You do not know when that time will come.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: It's like a man going away: He leaves his house and puts his servants in charge, each with their assigned task, and tells the one at the door to keep watch.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Therefore keep watch because you do not know when the owner of the house will come back—whether in the evening, or at midnight, or when the rooster crows, or at dawn.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: If he comes suddenly, do not let him find you sleeping.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: What I say to you, I say to everyone: 'Watch!'
segments.speaker: Jesus
